title: Groundnut its nutrition and fertilizer responses in India
abstract:
THE cultivated groundnut Arachis l~ypogaea L, originated in South
America and is now grown in 82 countries in the world and India is the largest
producer of the crop. India, China, Nigeria, USA and Senegal account
for four-fifths of the world's groundnut production. Groundnut was
introduced in India in the 16th century. The area under the crop, however,
was rather small till the beginning of the present century. being around one
lakh hectares. It increased progressively to 6 lakh hectares by the end of
the First World War and to 45 lakh hectares by 1950..........
